mapper.select: select profile_id, user_id, signature, todo_items, learning_history, learning_notes, favorites, wrong_questions, discussions, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from edu_student_profile where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into edu_student_profile ( user_id, signature, todo_items, learning_history, learning_notes, favorites, wrong_questions, discussions, create_by, remark, create_time ) values ( #{userId}, #{signature}, #{todoItems}, #{learningHistory}, #{learningNotes}, #{favorites}, #{wrongQuestions}, #{discussions}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate() )
mapper.select:
select distinct u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.student_no, u.email, u.avatar, u.phonenumber, u.sex, u.status, u.del_flag, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.pwd_update_date, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.update_by, u.update_time, u.remark from sys_user u inner join sys_user_role ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id inner join sys_role r on ur.role_id = r.role_id where u.del_flag = '0' and r.role_key = 'student'
and u.user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
and u.nick_name like concat('%', #{nickName}, '%')
and u.student_no like concat('%', #{studentNo}, '%')
and u.status = #{status}
and u.phonenumber like concat('%', #{phonenumber}, '%')
and date_format(u.create_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(u.create_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
order by u.create_time desc

select distinct u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.student_no, u.email, u.avatar, u.phonenumber, u.sex, u.status, u.del_flag, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.pwd_update_date, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.update_by, u.update_time, u.remark from sys_user u inner join sys_user_role ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id inner join sys_role r on ur.role_id = r.role_id where u.user_id = #{userId} and u.del_flag = '0' and r.role_key = 'student' limit 1
select user_id, student_no from sys_user where student_no = #{studentNo} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
